## Bug Fix

### Related Issue
Closes #_issue ids, ..._

### Description
Explain the bug and the fix.

### Root Cause
Describe what caused the bug.

### Solution
Describe how the fix resolves the issue.

### Tests
- [ ] Existing tests pass
- [ ] Added tests for the fix
- [ ] Added minimal doc

### Example
```java
// example showing the corrected behavior
```
